creator: mirrorlsw@leaseweb.com
text:
(In reply to Danilo G. Baio from comment #1)

Hey,

It is fine but then it would be preferable to point to mirror.nl.leaseweb.net
(which itself is a CNAME to mirror.ams1.nl.leaseweb.net) to not require a change on your side in case of a datacenter change (quite unlikely here but still).

Thanks
